summary: coral-wraith postinstall script exfiltrates host information over HTTP
details: The package ships a postinstall.js that executes automatically on `npm install`. The script imports `os`, `http`, and `child_process`, collects host identifiers (including `os.hostname()`), and issues outbound HTTP requests carrying that data. This is the canonical install-time host-recon and exfiltration pattern: the package has no legitimate functional purpose served by sending hostname/system information to an external endpoint at install time, and the behavior fires without user consent on any default install. Installing this package leaks installer/host metadata to a third party and provides a foothold for follow-on targeting.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
